pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly require this output path
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly require this output path
export_result.sh extracts these exact parameters from the Blender python API and verifier.py enforces them
verifier.py uses this as the default constraint: metadata.get("min_exr_size_kb", 500)

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on the standard Blender BMW benchmark demo file (BMW27.blend). Its initial state is synthetically altered via setup_task.sh to disable all relevant render passes and set output to PNG format. The export and verifier scripts check that 6 specific ViewLayer render passes (Z, mist, normal, diffuse_color, glossy_direct, ambient_occlusion) are re-enabled, the output format is exactly OPEN_EXR_MULTILAYER with a 32-bit color depth, and the generated .exr file is larger than 500KB. All required output paths perfectly match the task instructions.
